Event: Spring Festival 2026
Event Date: 01/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM321
Blooming of Power Amulet

Once in a while, the unit removes 4 random negative effects from self, and steals 45% spell power from 3 enemy units with the greatest spell power for 4 sec. The unit also gains a shield equal to 100% of the stolen spell power value for 4 sec. The shield blocks damage of any type and exists up to 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
